data.title: SEC Green Light on Liquid Staking Sends ETH Past $4K, Spurs Broad Staking and Layer-2 Rally
data.description:
The recent approval by the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) concerning liquid staking has significantly impacted the cryptocurrency market, causing the price of Ethereum (ETH) to surge beyond the $4,000 mark. This positive development not only boosted ETH's value but also triggered a widespread rally across various staking protocols and Layer-2 solutions, further invigorating investor interest and activity in these sectors. As a result, the overall sentiment in the crypto space has become increasingly optimistic, with market participants eager to explore the potential benefits of staking and the enhanced scalability offered by Layer-2 solutions.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/08/08/sec-greenlight-on-liquid-staking-sends-eth-past-usd4k-spurs-broad-staking-and-layer-2-rally

data.title: XRP gains legal clarity in US after Ripple settles SEC case
data.description:
Settlement confirms XRP is not a security in the US. Analysts see potential for a BlackRock XRP ETF. Bitcoin maximalists renew criticism of XRP. Ripple’s multi-year legal battle with the US Securities and Exchange Commission reached a decisive conclusion this week, triggering a sharp rally in XRP’s price and trading volume
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/xrp-gains-legal-clarity-in-us-after-ripple-settles-sec-case/

data.title: T-REX 2X Long Galaxy Digital ETF Launched by REX Shares and Tuttle Capital
data.description:
According to Foresight News, REX Shares and Tuttle Capital Management have introduced the T-REX 2X Long Galaxy Digital Daily Target ETF, with the ticker symbol GLXU. This ETF is designed to provide double leverage on Galaxy Digital's stock price, a digital asset company co-founded and led by Mike Novogratz.

The fund is part of the "T-REX" lineup of single-stock leveraged ETFs, which now includes 24 other funds tracking popular stocks such as Nvidia, Apple, and Strategy, a Bitcoin investment company. Similar to other single-stock leveraged ETFs, the T-REX 2X Long Galaxy Digital ETF is intended for daily holding, as prolonged holding may result in diminished returns due to volatility decay. The annual fee for the fund is set at 1.5%.

data.title: First 2x leveraged ETF tracking Galaxy Digital launched by REX Shares and Tuttle Capital
data.description:
The fund is one of 25 "T-REX" leveraged single-stock ETFs tracking popular companies like Apple, Nvidia, and Strategy.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/366194/first-2x-leveraged-etf-tracking-galaxy-digital-launched-by-rex-shares-and-tuttle-capital?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: USDC Treasury Mints Over 64 Million USDC on Ethereum
data.description: According to PANews, Whale Alert has reported that the USDC Treasury has minted 64,457,620 USDC on the Ethereum blockchain. This newly minted amount is approximately valued at $64,441,957.
